title: Lunar Habitat: Sensor Lattice for Uniform Floor Coverage
strategies: diagonal / single-line placement: points on the main diagonal (matches the checker baseline, star discrepancy ~0.26-0.33)
Hammersley / van der Corput set: one coordinate = (i+0.5)/n, the other = radical-inverse base 2 (reliable low discrepancy)
best rank-1 lattice: sweep the generator g over 1..n-1 for points ((i+0.5)/n, (i*g mod n + 0.5)/n) and keep the g with minimum exact discrepancy (a real search that beats a single fixed construction)
jittered / stratified grids, Fibonacci lattices, or local-search coordinate perturbation of a good seed set
